tasks.subject: Task 0: Database Migration & TypeScript Types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create 3 new tables (groups, group_teams, matches) and add all TypeScript interfaces.

**Files:**
- Create: supabase/migrations/009_tournament.sql
- Modify: src/types/index.ts

**Verify:** npm run build → success

tasks.subject: Task 1: Standings Computation Utility
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create shared utility that computes group standings from match results.

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/standings.ts

**Verify:** npm run build → success

acceptanceCriteria: Computes standings sorted by wins → diff → scored

tasks.subject: Task 2: Navigation Updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Torneo entries to admin sidebar, public nav, mobile bottom nav.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/admin/AdminSidebar.tsx
- Modify: src/components/public/PublicNav.tsx
- Modify: src/components/public/MobileBottomNav.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build → success

acceptanceCriteria: Mobile nav replaces Regolam. with Torneo

tasks.subject: Task 3: Admin Groups Tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admin page with Groups tab for group CRUD, team assignment, match generation.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/admin/torneo/page.tsx
- Create: src/components/admin/TournamentGroups.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build → success

tasks.subject: Task 4: Admin Calendar Tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Calendar tab for match scheduling, score entry, live toggle, bracket advancement.

**Files:**
- Create: src/components/admin/TournamentCalendar.tsx
- Modify: src/app/admin/torneo/page.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build → success

tasks.subject: Task 5: Admin Bracket Tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bracket tab with visual display, auto-generation from standings, team override.

**Files:**

- Modify: src/app/admin/torneo/page.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build → success

tasks.subject: Task 6: Public Calendar Section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Public /torneo page with calendar section, match cards, live indicator.

**Verify:** npm run build → success

tasks.subject: Task 7: Public Standings & Bracket Sections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add standings tables and bracket view to public tournament page.

**Files:**
- Create: src/components/public/StandingsTable.tsx
- Create: src/components/public/BracketView.tsx

tasks.subject: Task 8: Final Integration & Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end testing, polish, build verification.

**Verify:** npm run build → success; full manual test
